summary: A stylized, recurring 'BUSTED & BOOTED' segment in the visual language of a true-crime / cable-news tabloid: a glossy red-white-and-blue branded title logo recurs over an animated grey U.S. map that zooms and drops location pins state-to-state, each card naming a foreign national arrested for an immigration/fraud crime (Brazilian for fake Social Security & green cards in Boston, Uzbek for marriage fraud in Tampa, Ohio, a Rwandan genocide criminal in New York, a former Haitian mayor convicted of visa fraud in Boston). With an empty transcript, music_score 0.75 and likely_music_driven=true, it is a music-bed-driven spectacle rather than a talking segment. It fits youth-appeal produced content as a series-branded, dramatically lit, fast-card 'rogues gallery' designed to make enforcement feel like an entertainment franchise.

script.scene: Branded 'BUSTED & BOOTED' chrome logo (red & blue, gradient glow) over a dark grey map of the U.S. Northeast lit red-to-blue; a red location pin drops on Massachusetts. Card reads 'Boston, MA: Brazilian National Arrested for Selling Fake Social Security Cards & Green Cards.' DHS seal and 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' lockup at bottom.
Map slides/zooms to the Southeast, pin drops on Florida. 'BUSTED & BOOTED' logo upper-center. Card: 'Tampa, FL: Uzbek National Arrested for Marriage Fraud.' Same DHS/USCIS branding.
Map pans to the Midwest; Ohio highlighted in red. 'BUSTED & BOOTED' logo center. (Transition/establishing beat between named cases.) DHS seal centered low.

Map of the Northeast, New York highlighted red, pin region. Dark trapezoid card in italic serif: 'New York: Rwandan Genocide Criminal Arrested for Lying on Green Card & Citizenship Applications.' DHS/USCIS lockup.

Map returns to Massachusetts, pin on the coast. Card: 'Boston, MA: Former Haitian Mayor Convicted on Three Counts of Visa Fraud for Lying about his Involvement in Political Killings.' 'BUSTED & BOOTED' logo and DHS/USCIS branding throughout.

notable_text: Boston, MA: Brazilian National Arrested for Selling Fake Social Security Cards & Green Cards
Tampa, FL: Uzbek National Arrested for Marriage Fraud
New York: Rwandan Genocide Criminal Arrested for Lying on Green Card & Citizenship Applications
Boston, MA: Former Haitian Mayor Convicted on Three Counts of Visa Fraud for Lying about his Involvement in Political Killings
